results.rendered_html:
pra-ṇi-√pat ( Pāṇ. viii, 4, 17 ) P. -patati (esp. ind.p. -patya), to throw one's self down before, bow respectfully to (acc., rarely dat. or loc.),  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. -pātayati, to cause a person (acc.) to bow down or fall prostrate,  Mālav.

results.rendered_html: praṇipat 1 P. To bow down to, fall prostrate before, bow respectfully to, salute (with acc. or dat.); praṇipatya surāstasmai śamayitre suradviṣāṃ  R. 10. 15 ; vāgīśaṃ vāgbhirarthyābhiḥ praṇipatyopatasthire  Ku. 2. 3 ; 3. 60.
